name: sequenceforge
description: SequenceForge is a framework-agnostic GSAP image-sequence plugin. It writes start-image, end-image, and video prompts from a plain-text scene description, supports hybrid manual or provider-driven media generation, extracts numbered PNG frames with ffmpeg, inspects an existing GSAP project, and generates a framework-aware canvas/ScrollTrigger integration blueprint for vanilla, React/Next, Vue/Nuxt, and Svelte/SvelteKit projects.
